data.title: RED test: record-test-status.sh --attest mode
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write a failing test file for the --attest flag on record-test-status.sh. The test creates a synthetic worktree artifacts directory with a valid test-gate-status file (status=passed, valid diff_hash, tested_files), then invokes record-test-status.sh --attest <dir> and asserts on the written output.

### Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-attest.sh

### Test approach (Given/When/Then)
- Given: a temp worktree artifacts dir containing test-gate-status with status=passed and a valid diff_hash
- When: record-test-status.sh --attest <worktree-artifacts-dir> is invoked in a git repo with staged changes
- Then: test-gate-status is written to session artifacts dir with status=passed, current diff hash, attest_source=<worktree-id>, and tested_files populated from union of source + session-local tests

### Test cases
1. test_attest_writes_passed_status — happy path: source status is passing, output has status=passed
2. test_attest_writes_current_diff_hash — output diff_hash matches compute-diff-hash.sh output
3. test_attest_includes_attest_source — output includes attest_source=<worktree-id>
4. test_attest_unions_tested_files — tested_files in output is union of source + local
5. test_attest_refuses_missing_source — exits non-zero when source test-gate-status is absent
6. test_attest_refuses_failed_source — exits non-zero when source status is "failed"
7. test_attest_refuses_stale_source — exits non-zero when source diff_hash doesn't match worktree content

### .test-index
Update .test-index with RED marker [test_attest_writes_passed_status] for plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-attest.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-attest.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_attest_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-attest.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for record-test-status.sh
  Verify: grep '\[test_attest_writes_passed_status\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) against current codebase (--attest not yet implemented)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-attest.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
